# 1 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, -1
addiw x11, x10, 1
# Result: a1 = 0

# 2 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addiw x11, x10, -1
# Result: a1 = 0

# 3 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addiw x11, x10, 1
# Result: a1 = 0

# 4 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addiw x11, x10, 1
# Result: a1 = 0

# 5 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addiw x10, x11, 0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 6 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# 7 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0x1

# 8 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0x5

# Result: a1 = 0x1

li x10, 1

li x10, 1
csrw 0x747, x10
li x10, 0x8d
csrw 0x3a0, x10
li x10, 0xffffffffffffffff
csrw 0x3b0, x10
li x11, 0
lw x12, 0(a1)
# Result: mcause = 0x5

# 101 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 1
csrw 0x747, t0
li t1, 0b10000101
csrw 0x3a0, t1
li t2, 0x80002000 >> 2
csrw 0x3b0, t2
li t3, 0x80003000 >> 2
csrw 0x3b1, t3

li x10, 0xdeadbeef
li t4, 0x80002400
sw x10, 0(t4)
# Result: a0 = 0xf
